What We Offer

Our Services

Women's Cut & Finish

A bespoke cut tailored to your face shape, lifestyle, and vision — finished to perfection with a precision blow-dry.

£85

Men's Cut & Finish

Precision cutting for the modern gentleman — sharp lines, refined texture, effortless style.

£55

Full Head Colour

Vibrant, long-lasting colour applied with expert care using professional-grade pigments for flawless coverage.

£180

Balayage & Highlights

Sun-kissed, dimensional colour that moves beautifully and grows out gracefully — the art of the light-filled strand.

£220

Toning & Gloss Treatment

Neutralise unwanted tones, enhance depth, and add extraordinary mirror shine in a single luxurious service.

£95

Keratin Smoothing Treatment

Transformative frizz elimination and silk-smooth texture that lasts up to five months.

£250

Bridal Hair

Your most important day deserves flawless, lasting artistry. We create timeless bridal looks that endure every moment.

£195

Hair Extensions Consultation

Explore your options for added length, volume, and texture with our extensions specialist.

£45

Deep Conditioning Treatment

Intensive nourishment that restores moisture, strength, and luminous health to damaged hair.

£65
Est. 2009

Our Philosophy

Where Craft
Meets Luxury

We believe great hair is not simply cut or coloured — it is created. Every client who enters our studio is met with genuine curiosity, a listening ear, and hands guided by years of uncompromising craft.

Our team draws on the finest European colouring traditions alongside the most innovative contemporary techniques, delivering results that are quietly extraordinary. We never rush, never compromise, and never stop learning.

From the quality of our products to the stillness of our space, every element of your experience is considered. This is more than a salon — it is a sanctuary.

Client Stories

What They Say

"
★★★★★

"I have been searching for a colourist who truly understands how light interacts with hair. I found her here. My balayage has never looked more natural — three months in and it still turns heads."

— Sophia A.
★★★★★

"The keratin treatment changed everything. My morning routine went from 45 minutes to ten. The team took time to truly understand my hair — the result has been nothing short of transformative."

— Rachel M.
★★★★★

"For my wedding day, I wanted perfection. What I received exceeded even that. My hair stayed flawless for twelve hours through rain, dancing, and tears of joy. Utterly incomparable."

— Charlotte B.
★★★★★

"I have visited salons across Paris and Milan. This studio stands alongside the very best — not only in technical skill, but in the quiet, unhurried attention they give to every single client."

— James W.
★★★★★

"After years of over-processed colour I came here hesitant and damaged. They restored not just my hair but my confidence. Six months later and my hair is the healthiest it has ever been."

— Isabella F.
